mapper.sql: id, message_id, session_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, media_url, media_type, file_size, duration, thumbnail_url, original_filename, width, height, format, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, original_price, product_url, coupon_amount, activity_info, emoji_code, emoji_name, emoji_package_id, content_hash, encrypted_key, signature, public_key_fingerprint, status, is_read, read_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO multimedia_message ( message_id, session_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, media_url, media_type, file_size, duration, thumbnail_url, original_filename, width, height, format, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, original_price, product_url, coupon_amount, activity_info, emoji_code, emoji_name, emoji_package_id, content_hash, encrypted_key, signature, public_key_fingerprint, status, is_read, create_time ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{sessionId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{messageType}, #{mediaUrl}, #{mediaType}, #{fileSize}, #{duration}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{originalFilename}, #{width}, #{height}, #{format}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{productUrl}, #{couponAmount}, #{activityInfo}, #{emojiCode}, #{emojiName}, #{emojiPackageId}, #{contentHash}, #{encryptedKey}, #{signature}, #{publicKeyFingerprint}, #{status}, #{isRead}, #{createTime} )
